fields.helpText: This is a one-entry record that holds user preferences for the eRx Holding Queue.

This sub-file contains user specific preferences for the Patient Centric Queue in the eRx Holding Queue option. Users without an entry in this sub-file will have the following default values for each field:                                                    LOOK BACK DAYS: 365 DAYS                                     SORT BY: ELAPSED DAYS                                     SORT ORDER: DESCENDING                       INCLUDE CS/NON-CS: BOTH                    CS SCHEDULE: SCHEDULES II -V

This sub-file contains user specific preferences for the Single Patient Queue in the eRx Holding Queue option. Users without an entry in this sub-file will have the following default values for each field:               LOOK BACK DAYS: 365 DAYS                   SORT BY: RECEIVED DATE                SORT ORDER: DESCENDING               DISPLAY SIG: OFF        GROUP BY CS/NON-CS: OFF      INCLUDE ALL STATUSES: OFF

This sub-file contains user specific preferences for the Rx Medication Queue in the eRx Holding Queue option. Users without an entry in this sub-file will have the following default values for each field:                                                LOOK BACK DAYS: 365 DAYS                   SORT BY: RECEIVED DATE                SORT ORDER: DESCENDING         INCLUDE CS/NON-CS: BOTH               CS SCHEDULE: SCHEDULES II - V        GROUP BY CS/NON-CS: OFF      INCLUDE ALL STATUSES: OFF
